metadata.description: GCP to AWS migration plugins for Cursor — infrastructure mapping, cost estimation, Terraform generation, and AI/agentic workload migration to Amazon Bedrock and AWS-native agent frameworks.

plugins.name: migration-to-aws
plugins.description: Migrate from GCP to AWS — including your entire AI stack. Moves infrastructure (Cloud Run → Fargate, Cloud SQL → Aurora, GKE → EKS), OpenAI/Gemini workloads to Amazon Bedrock, and agentic systems (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK) to AWS-native frameworks. Generates runnable Terraform, migration scripts, provider adapters, and deployment artifacts. Gives honest model-by-model pricing comparisons so you know exactly when Bedrock saves money and when it doesn't.
